Retractor Lite 36 Banner Stand Specifications & Setup Features

Professional-grade banner stand hardware designed for trade shows, retail displays, and promotional events. This lightweight aluminum base system provides reliable performance for indoor advertising and presentation needs.

Key Hardware Features

  • Lightweight Aluminum Base: Durable construction that's easy to transport between events
  • Color Options: Available in professional Black or Silver finish to match your display aesthetic
  • Two Swivel Feet: Enhanced stability system prevents tipping during use
  • Shock Cord Pole System: Quick and easy setup and takedown for efficient event management
  • Snap Rail Attachment: Banner attaches securely with snap rail on top and banner tape on bottom
  • Compact Design: Space-efficient footprint ideal for trade show booths and retail spaces

Product Dimensions & Specifications

  • Display Size: 36.5" W x 83.5" H x 15" D
  • Product Weight: 7.5 lbs for easy portability
  • Banner Compatibility: Designed for custom printed banners (banner sold separately)
  • Setup Time: Under 2 minutes assembly

Note: Custom printed banner is sold separately. Hardware includes base unit, pole system, and attachment mechanisms.

Aluminum Banner Stand Construction & Durability

Our Retractor Lite 36 hardware features premium aluminum construction designed for repeated trade show and display use.

Aluminum Base Construction

  • Lightweight Design: High-grade aluminum provides strength without excessive weight
  • Corrosion Resistance: Anodized finish prevents oxidation and maintains appearance
  • Professional Finish Options: Choose from Black or Silver powder-coated finishes
  • Shock Absorption: Engineered to handle normal transport and setup stresses

Pole System Materials

  • Shock Cord Technology: Internal bungee system ensures consistent pole tension
  • Aluminum Pole Sections: Lightweight yet rigid support structure
  • Snap-Lock Mechanisms: Durable plastic components rated for 1000+ setup cycles
  • Swivel Foot Design: Adjustable feet accommodate uneven surfaces

Expected Lifespan

With proper care and storage, this banner stand hardware is designed for 2-3 years of regular trade show use, supporting hundreds of setup and breakdown cycles.

Banner Stand Hardware Color & Finish Options

Select from professional finish options to complement your trade show display and branding requirements.

Available Finishes

  • Black Finish: Powder-coated matte black provides a sleek, professional appearance that works with any banner design
  • Silver Finish: Brushed aluminum appearance offers a modern, contemporary look ideal for tech and corporate displays

Finish Durability

  • Scratch Resistance: Powder coating resists minor scratches from transport and setup
  • Fade Protection: UV-resistant coating maintains color consistency under trade show lighting
  • Easy Maintenance: Smooth finish wipes clean with standard cleaning products
  • Professional Appearance: Consistent color matching across all hardware components

Selecting Your Finish

Consider your banner artwork and display environment when choosing your finish. Black hardware tends to blend with most banner designs, while silver provides a more prominent, modern appearance.

Production & Turnaround Times for Custom Banner Stand Hardware

We provide flexible production time ranges to meet your trade show and event scheduling needs. Choose from express to standard production options.

2 Business Days Express Production

Need your banner stand hardware quickly for an upcoming trade show? Our express option ensures rapid fulfillment.

  • Ideal for last-minute trade show preparations
  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Emergency same-day options available - contact customer service
  • Production time plus shipping time determines total delivery schedule

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production timeframe balances speed with cost-effectiveness for trade show displays.

  • Standard option for most trade show and event planning timelines
  • Includes quality control inspection of all hardware components
  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Recommended for planned trade show display purchases

5 Business Days Saver Production

Cost-effective option when your trade show timeline allows for extended production.

  • Budget-friendly choice for advance trade show planning
  • Same quality standards as express options
  • Ideal for bulk orders or multiple display hardware purchases
  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day

Production Note: Turnaround begins when your order is confirmed. Hardware items typically ship within selected production timeframe as they require minimal customization.

Banner Artwork Requirements for Retractor Lite 36 Hardware

Specific artwork specifications ensure your custom banner fits perfectly with the Retractor Lite 36 hardware system.

Banner Dimensions

  • Width: 33" finished banner width (fits 36.5" hardware)
  • Height: 78" finished banner height (fits 83.5" extended hardware)
  • Bleed Area: Add 0.25" bleed on all sides for printing
  • Safe Zone: Keep critical text/graphics 0.5" from edges

File Format Requirements

  • Preferred Formats: PDF, EPS, or AI files with embedded fonts
  • Resolution: 150 DPI at full size for optimal print quality
  • Color Mode: CMYK color mode for accurate color reproduction
  • Font Requirements: Convert all text to outlines or embed fonts

Design Considerations

  • Attachment Areas: Top 2" and bottom 2" will be used for hardware attachment
  • Viewing Angle: Design for eye-level viewing at trade shows and retail spaces
  • Text Sizing: Use minimum 18pt font for readability from 6 feet away
  • Image Quality: High-resolution images prevent pixelation when printed large format

Design Services

Professional graphic design services available if you need assistance creating artwork that maximizes the impact of your Retractor Lite 36 display system.

Note: Banner printing is a separate order item. Hardware and banner can be ordered together for complete display solution.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Retractor Lite 36 Hardware

What banner size works with the Retractor Lite 36 hardware?

The hardware accommodates banners measuring 33" wide by 78" tall. The hardware dimensions are 36.5" W x 83.5" H x 15" D when fully assembled, providing proper spacing for banner attachment and display.

Is the banner included with the hardware purchase?

No, the banner is sold separately. This listing includes only the hardware components: aluminum base, shock cord pole system, snap rail, and attachment mechanisms. Custom banners can be ordered separately to complete your display.

How long does setup take for trade show use?

The shock cord pole system allows for setup in under 2 minutes. The pole sections connect automatically via internal bungee cord, and the banner attaches with the snap rail system and bottom banner tape.

What's the difference between Black and Silver finishes?

Both finishes offer the same durability and functionality. Black provides a neutral appearance that works with most banner designs, while Silver offers a more contemporary, modern look. Choose based on your display aesthetic preferences.

Can this hardware be used outdoors?

The Retractor Lite 36 is designed for indoor use at trade shows, retail spaces, and corporate events. For outdoor applications, consider our outdoor banner stand options designed to handle wind and weather conditions.

How much does the complete hardware system weigh?

The entire hardware system weighs 7.5 lbs, making it easy to transport between trade shows and events. The lightweight aluminum construction balances portability with stability.

Is assembly required upon delivery?

No permanent assembly is required. The hardware ships with all components and sets up quickly for each use. Setup instructions are included with every hardware order.

What's included in the hardware purchase?

Your purchase includes the aluminum base unit, shock cord pole system, snap rail for top banner attachment, banner tape for bottom attachment, and setup instructions. Everything needed except the custom printed banner.
